name: hotel general managers overseeing 50-100 rooms tool
description: For hotel general managers overseeing 50-100 rooms, inadequate staffing forecasts cause overstaffing or understaffing. We provide automated scheduling instead of manual scheduling and forecasting methods.
problem_solved: Inadequate staffing forecasts lead to overstaffing or understaffing.
features: simple user interface for inputting staffing needs
basic forecasting algorithm based on historical data
manual override option for schedule adjustments
